message:
refactor: consolidate extractIssueID into beads.ExtractIssueID (gt-7rf9v)

DRY violation: extractIssueID was duplicated in 5 files (plus one inline
copy in api.go). All stripped the external:prefix:id wrapper from bead IDs.

Consolidated into a single exported beads.ExtractIssueID() function and
updated all 6 call sites and 2 test files to use it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
